name: claude-code-provider-gateway
description: Claude Code Gateway — proxy Anthropic-compatible para múltiplos providers de LLM

scripts.build: (cd packages/panel && npm run build) && (cd packages/daemon && npm run build)
scripts.dev: concurrently --names daemon,panel --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:daemon" "npm run dev:panel"
scripts.dev:desk: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.cargo/env" 2>/dev/null || true; CC_GATEWAY_EXTERNAL_DAEMON=1 VITE_CC_GATEWAY_EXTERNAL_DAEMON=1 concurrently --kill-others --names daemon,desktop --prefix-colors cyan,green "bun run dev:daemon" "cd packages/desktop && bun run dev"'
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/panel
